summary: Iteration 430: Verified Geology Workshop icon fixes, Direct State Substitution dispatcher (7 PULL pills), Flatland Rule compliance, and dead-state audit. All major features working correctly.

details: Tool ring visible with 9 distinct Lucide icons (Hammer, Search, Droplets, Layers, Compass, Map, Eye, Activity, Cog)
Center block shows Flame icon for 'Igneous Rocks' material
Material selector shows Igneous Rocks, Sedimentary Rocks, Metamorphic options
Backend GET /api/workshop/geology/tools returns 9 tools with correct icon_symbol values
Masonry Workshop: Shows Hammer icons in tool ring, Mountain icon for Granite material
Carpentry Workshop: Tool ring visible with themed icons
Nursing Workshop: Shows Heart and Stethoscope icons, Heart icon for Patient Vitals
All 7 PULL pills found with correct data-testids: pull-avatar_gen, pull-cosmic_portrait, pull-forecasts, pull-dream_viz, pull-story_gen, pull-scene_gen, pull-starseed
URL did NOT change when pulling Avatar tool (stayed at /sovereign-hub)
Matrix render slot appeared with tool content (Avatar Creator)
Release button appeared with text 'RELEASE · RETURN TO LATTICE'
After release, returned to lattice without URL change
Dispatcher visible again after release
Dispatcher tools render inline inside matrix-render-slot
No portal/modal/fixed overlay detected
Content renders in document flow
GET /api/workshop/registry returns geology module
Geology module has title='Geology Workshop', accentColor='#6B7280'
POST /api/journal creates entry (requires title field)
POST /api/moods creates mood entry
POST /api/sage-fx/prompt-to-fx returns filters
POST /api/coach/sessions creates session
POST /api/coach/chat returns AI response
Journal page: Title input, content textarea, mood selector visible
Mood page: Emotional Landscape with mood selection buttons (Happy, Peaceful, etc.)
Coach page: After login + new session + type selection, coach-input and send-message-btn become reachable

critical_code_review_comments: Geology Workshop icons correctly use LUCIDE_ICON_MAP to resolve backend icon_symbol names to Lucide components
MODULE_TOOL_FALLBACK provides themed fallback icons for legacy single-letter modules
resolveMaterialIcon() correctly maps material types to icons (igneous→Flame, sedimentary→Layers, minerals→Gem)
Direct State Substitution correctly uses ProcessorState context to swap render modes without URL navigation
MatrixRenderSlot renders tool content inline, complying with Flatland Rule
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Geology Workshop icon fixes verified working. Direct State Substitution dispatcher with 7 PULL pills working correctly - URL stays at /sovereign-hub during pull/release. Flatland Rule compliance verified. Dead-state audit shows all APIs functional. Coach page requires login + new session + type selection before chat input becomes visible.

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue: Geology Workshop showing generic Wrench icons instead of distinct tool icons
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: UniversalWorkshop.js was not importing full Lucide library and lacked LUCIDE_ICON_MAP to resolve backend icon_symbol names
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Main agent added LUCIDE_ICON_MAP, MODULE_TOOL_FALLBACK, resolveToolIcon(), and resolveMaterialIcon() functions
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 9 geology tools now show distinct icons (Hammer, Search, Droplets, Layers, Compass, Map, Eye, Activity, Cog)
